name: Ask Sales V4.1 focused post-fix development checks

prompts.question: What is the earliest time I can send the day-of SMS reminder?

goldNeeds.claim: Do not substitute the 9 PM cutoff or route a policy gap to tech.

prompts.question: Can you confirm whether this client's ACH payment cleared?

goldNeeds.claim: Stable policy cannot establish a live payment state.

prompts.question: Can I email the contract link if the client wants to review it and is paying by wire?

goldNeeds.claim: A requested contract may be sent; screen-sharing remains best practice. The source never said do not send.

prompts.question: Can reps create a custom payment plan for a client?

goldNeeds.claim: Only approved listed plans may be used.

prompts.question: What if the client keeps insisting?

goldNeeds.claim: Restate the approved-plan boundary without inventing an escalation or exception request.
